notes: Use this file to compare a downstream project against the current Foundations bundle.
Run npm run sync:foundations to pull newer instruction and helper-script bundles into downstream repos.
Version 2026.03.22.2 completes the reusable Dataverse helper-script layer by generating plan artifacts and registering planned tables through PAC.
Version 2026.03.22.3 promotes Node-based helper entry points so downstream npm workflows are cross-platform by default.
Version 2026.03.22.4 adds Node-based auth wrappers so setup:auth and the 1Password PAC wrapper are cross-platform by default.
